# terrible_community_general_icinga2_feature (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) This is the feature name to enable or disable.

### Optional

- `state` (String) If set to `present` and feature is disabled, then feature is enabled. If set to `present` and feature is already enabled, then nothing is changed. If set to `absent` and feature is enabled, then feature is disabled. If set to `absent` and feature is already disabled, then nothing is changed.
